title: toechima erythrocarpum subsp. erythrocarpum
intro: Toechima erythrocarpum subsp. erythrocarpum is a species of plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the "red-fruited Toechima." This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Toechima erythrocarpum subsp. erythrocarpum include the potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used in folk medicine to support overall health and well-being.
